message:
The other day, I was reminiscing about the time we had a surprise snowstorm here in the South. I remember waking up to a winter wonderland outside, but my first thought was, "Uh-oh, did I even bring in the patio furniture?" Spoiler alert: I didn’t. 

After a frantic dash outside in my pajamas, I managed to rescue most of it, but not before slipping on some ice and landing right in a heap of snow. Talk about a wake-up call! 

That day taught me that while I can laugh at the situation now, being a little more prepared can save some headaches later. So, whether it’s keeping an eye on the weather or having a few essentials on hand, a little prep goes a long way.  

Has anyone else had a not-so-ready moment like that? I'd love to hear your stories!
